channel.title: GitHub Trending - Nuovi in PHP (Monthly)
channel.description: Repository (Nuovi) più popolari in PHP nel periodo monthly.

item.title: 🐘 yaojingang/GEOFlow (1146 ⭐)
item.description:
👤 Owner: yaojingang

📝 Repository: yaojingang/GEOFlow

]]>

item.title: 🐘 aregowe/magento2-module-polyshell-protection (42 ⭐)
item.description:
👤 Owner: aregowe

📝 Repository: aregowe/magento2-module-polyshell-protection

📄 Descrizione: Comprehensive defense-in-depth Magento 2 module that closes the PolyShell unrestricted file upload vulnerability (APSB25-94) — blocking polyglot webshell uploads across eight interception layers including request path blocking, controller-level upload prevention, polyglot file detection, and framework-level image hardening.

⭐ Stelle: 42

🍴 Forks: 4

💻 Linguaggio: PHP

🏷️ Topics: magento magento2 php php8 security

📜 Licenza: No license

⏰ Creato il: 2026-04-14T17:13:56Z

🔄 Ultimo Aggiornamento: 2026-04-23T12:28:18Z

Visita il Repository su GitHub

]]>

item.title: 🐘 YanGusik/laravel-spawn (33 ⭐)
item.description:
👤 Owner: YanGusik

📝 Repository: YanGusik/laravel-spawn

📄 Descrizione: Laravel Spawn is an async runtime for Laravel powered by PHP TrueAsync. It runs multiple requests concurrently in isolated coroutines within a single worker, eliminating shared state issues while delivering high performance without threads or process overhead.

⭐ Stelle: 33

🍴 Forks: 0

💻 Linguaggio: PHP

📜 Licenza: No license

📝 Repository: Automattic/wordpress-atmosphere

📄 Descrizione: ATmosphere connects your WordPress site to the AT Protocol network. When you publish a post, it is automatically cross-posted to Bluesky and registered as a standard.site document on your Personal Data Server (PDS).

👤 Owner: infinri

📝 Repository: infinri/A.S.E

🍴 Forks: 1

💻 Linguaggio: PHP
